Accumulative Time Deposits
The best way to accumulate Your savings.
Business card
Currency: AMD, USD, EUR, RUR
Duration of Deposit: 6-24 months (181 – 732 days)
Minimal ammount of deposit: AMD 50,000, USD 200, EUR 200 or RUR 5,000
Tab: Advantages
The Depositor can make deposit amount top-ups anytime during the validity period of deposit agreement except for the last three months of the deposit validity period)
During the validity period of the deposit agreement the interest amount calculated towards the deposits for each complete month is topped-up to the depositor's deposit account, moreover, the interest for the first six months (181 days) is topped-up at the end of the sixth month. During the mentioned six months a bonus is calculated and unilaterally paid to the depositor at the end of the sixth months, which, depending on the deposit currency comprises 0.13% for AMD, 0.03% for USD, 0.004% for EURO and 0.06% for RUR (annually), calculated correspondingly towards the daily balance available on deposit account
If you wish, you can receive a VISA Classic/MasterCard Standard payment card, if at the moment the funds on the deposit account equal or don’t exceed 7.5 MM AMD (corresponding foreign currency) or VISA Gold/MasterCard Gold payment card if at the moment the funds on the deposit account exceed 7.5 MM AMD (equal foreign currency)
The provision and service of VISA Classic/MasterCard Standard and VISA Gold/MasterCard Gold payment cards (regardless of the number of accounts and implementation of transactions) is free of charge
If you wish, a credit line up to
of the deposit account funds can be attached to the received AMD, USD and Euro payment card, which you can use during the deposit agreement validity period
If you wish you can be provided with
American Express Gold

card credit lines with deposit pledge in the privileged tariffs and conditions mentioned below

No interest is calculated when making payment transactions via credit lines attached to VISA Classic/MasterCard Standard, VISA Gold/MasterCard Gold, American Express Gold/American Express Blue payment cards until the 7
, 14
and 20
day of the next month correspondingly.
* The current statement is valid for the deposit agreements signed from the 5th of August, 2016. In case of deposits signed in USD and AMD until the 4th of August, 2016 a bonus in the amount of correspondingly 0.06 and 0.2 percent (annually) is paid calculated correspondingly towards the daily balance of the funds available on the deposit account during those months.
Replenishment is not allowed during the last three months of the deposit term.
Full details on deposit replenishment conditions can be found in the term
deposits tariffs

YOU CAN FIND THE CALCULATION METHOD OF ANNUAL INTEREST YIELD HERE:
Calculation of annual interest yield

More information:
Time deposits
Previous terms of deposit tariffs
Tab: Important to know
To register a deposit, the required documents are:
Identification document
Public service number or reference on receipt of a public service number.
The interest amount is calculated daily on the account balance.
Funds of the third parties may also be credited to the depositor's account, with specification of details of the depositor's account. Unless otherwise provided in the contract, a statement shall be printed out.
The deposit is registered in the branches of the Bank.
The Bank accrues the interest amounts on the deposit amount from the day after the date of deposit to the Bank until it is returned to the customer or the day before the deposit is withdrawn from the depositor's account for other grounds. In the event that the date of payment of the deposit and its interest amounts coincides with the Bank's non-working day, the payment shall be made on the following business day, but no additional interest shall be charged for non-working days.
The interest amounts on deposits in foreign currency are paid in AMD at the average exchange rate of the day published by the CBA. At the customer's request, the interest amounts may be paid in the currency of the deposit.
The Bank has the right to unilaterally change the size of payable interest on demand deposits and funds in the bank account. Unless otherwise specified, a statement shall be printed.
In case of request of a bank deposit in AMD in writing earlier than the deadline stipulated in the time deposit agreement, the deposit and the interest rate of 1% for the days, preceding the end of deposit validity will be paid to the depositor within 1 banking day.
In case of request of a bank deposit in foreign currency in writing earlier than the deadline stipulated in the time deposit agreement, the deposit and the interest rate of 1% for the days, preceding the end of deposit validity will be paid to the depositor within 1 banking day.
If the amount of the time deposit is not requested after the termination of the deposit agreement or upon the occurrence of the circumstances provided for by the contract, the contract is considered to be extended with the terms of the demand deposit. Unless otherwise specified, a statement shall be printed.
The Bank may not unilaterally reduce the deposit interest amounts, determined by the deposit contract, deposited with the term of its return upon expiry of a specified period or upon the occurrence of the conditions, provided for in the contract. Unless otherwise specified, a statement shall be printed.
Your Financial Directory
fininfo.am
ATTENTION: "YOUR FINANCIAL DIRECTORY" IS THE ELECTRONIC SYSTEM FOR SEARCH, COMPARISON OF SERVICES, OFFERED TO INDIVIDUALS, AND MAKING THE SELECTION OF THE MOST EFFICIENT OPTIONS FOR YOU EASIER.
